expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: Phase 0 model check notice delivered per spec.

expectations.text: Response does NOT include an Assumption Map table
expectations.evidence: No Assumption Map — went directly to Phase 2 Q1 after research.

expectations.text: First question includes a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single focused question about CI eval execution environment.
Recommends adopting promptfoo or inspect-ai rather than building a bespoke runner.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No final scorecard. Interrogation continues from Q1.

expectations.text: Agent mentions launching or attempting background agents for research
expectations.evidence: Both Agent (Explore) and general-purpose background agents attempted — Agent tool unavailable, fell back to direct Glob/Grep/Read.

expectations.text: Agent explored the codebase before the first question
expectations.evidence: 9 key codebase findings documented: no .github/, no toolchain, no eval runner, partial eval coverage, .claude/settings.local.json shell restrictions, no docs/decisions/.
